narrative:
Meigs County has 14,252 registered voters, with 51.4% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 37.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 11.2%, a pronounced Republican lean of 26.1 percentage points. Baby Boomers are the largest generational cohort at 31.6% of registrants.
